message:
feat(beads): Add semantic search and daemon beads (mirror xf)

New P1 beads for semantic search infrastructure:
- coding_agent_session_search-3olx: Epic for bake-off
- coding_agent_session_search-1b9z: Warm Model Daemon Architecture
- coding_agent_session_search-3dcw: Two-Tier Progressive Search
- coding_agent_session_search-3t2r: Unit and integration tests
- coding_agent_session_search-hwtz: E2E integration test suite

These mirror the xf beads for semantic search, adapted for
searching AI coding session archives. The daemon infrastructure
is shared between xf and cass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
